userDescription: Healthcare ontology graph for navigating patient care entities and their relationships. 12 entity types (Patient, Provider, Encounter, Claim, Prescription, PatientDiagnosis, Medication, Diagnosis, Payer, CommunityHealth, MedicationAdherence, Vitals) connected by 18 relationships. Use for entity lookups, care pathway traversals, adherence checks, vitals review, relationship discovery, provider and payer analysis, claim investigation, and population health insights.
